quoteText: He's being polite. The real question is why your 401k provider won't let you buy an ounce of gold but happily charges you fees to own shares of companies drowning in debt.

What he's not telling you is that your 401(k) provider makes zero commission on physical silver. Funny how they never mention that when pushing their managed funds.
